description.tr: Look up milestones and customs status with your consignment reference—use the quote page for pricing, not this tool.
description.en: Look up milestones and customs status with your consignment reference—use the quote page for pricing, not this tool.

keyword.tr: consignment reference lookup, shipment milestone trace UK Turkey, cargo status by reference
keyword.en: consignment reference lookup, shipment milestone trace UK Turkey, cargo status by reference

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Use your reference to view sea/road milestones. Customs status depends on formal declarations.
text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.
